items.title: New EMS Training Completed
items.body: Hart County EMS personnel recently completed advanced emergency response training focused on improving patient care, response time, and coordination with other public safety agencies.

items.title: Road Maintenance Scheduled for Reed Creek Highway
items.body: Public Works crews will begin maintenance and resurfacing operations along Reed Creek Highway starting next week. Motorists should expect minor delays and are encouraged to use alternate routes when possible.

items.title: County Offices Closed for Holiday
items.body: All Hart County administrative offices will be closed on Friday in observance of the upcoming holiday. Emergency services will remain fully operational during this time.

items.title: New Job Openings Available
items.body: Hart County is currently accepting applications for several open positions across multiple departments. Interested applicants are encouraged to visit the Employment page for full details and application instructions.

items.title: Water Service Interruption Notice
items.body: A temporary water service interruption will occur in the North Hartwell area due to scheduled infrastructure repairs. Service is expected to be restored by late afternoon.

items.title: Park Improvements Underway at Paynes Creek
items.body: Improvements to facilities at Paynes Creek Campground are currently underway, including updated picnic areas, improved parking, and additional signage for visitors.
